name: Ghost Town
hints: More of the ghost town. A saloon and a Dry-Goods store are here.
GO SALO to enter the saloon. GO STOR to enter the Dry-Goods store.
The Dry-Goods store is the TREASURE ROOM! Drop all treasures there and SCORE.
The store has essential supplies (shovel, matches, compass). The saloon has a mirror and bell. E=town (1), W=town (3).
notes: Ghost town with saloon (room 11) and Dry-Goods store (room 15 = TREASURE ROOM). E=town (1), W=town (3).
